name: Colloidal Oatmeal
description: A finely milled oat ingredient with FDA-approved skin protectant status, proven to relieve eczema and dry skin.
scientificSummary: Contains avenanthramides, unique polyphenols exclusive to oats, with potent anti-itch and anti-histamine properties.
mechanismOfAction: Avenanthramides inhibit NF-kB and reduce histamine release, while beta-glucan and starches form a protective film.

seo.title: Colloidal Oatmeal - FDA-Approved Skin Protectant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Colloidal Oatmeal soothes eczema, calms itching, and protects the most sensitive skin.
